name: Free Online Color Palette Extractor - ATools
description: Upload an image and extract dominant colors as HEX values and ready-to-use CSS variables, processed fully in your browser.
seoDescription: Free online color palette extractor for designers and developers. Upload an image and get a clean set of dominant colors with HEX values and optional CSS variable snippets. Everything runs locally in your browser with zero uploads, ideal for brand color exploration, UI palette design and quick theme generation.
